name: [BUG-GW-001] TC-GW-001 — CORS allow-origin must not be wildcard "*" on oauth-token routes
description:
**[KNOWN BUG — BUG-GW-001]**

**What this test does:**
Calls GET /oauth-token/api/v1/token and inspects the CORS response headers.

**Expected CORS headers:**
- access-control-allow-origin: https://rms.dev.demo-fsit.com (explicit trusted origin)
- access-control-allow-headers: Content-Type, Authorization (explicit list)

**Actual CORS headers:**
- access-control-allow-origin: * (wildcard — any origin)
- access-control-allow-headers: * (wildcard — any header)
- access-control-allow-methods: GET,POST,PUT,DELETE,PATCH,OPTIONS

**Why this is dangerous:**
Wildcard CORS means any website on the internet can make cross-origin requests to the oauth-token service from a user's browser. Combined with BUG-OT-002 (no auth enforcement), a malicious page can silently obtain the KCB API token on behalf of any user who visits it, even if that user has no RMS account.

**Fix:** Replace the APISIX global CORS plugin wildcard with an explicit allow-list containing only the RMS frontend origin.
descriptionHtml:
[KNOWN BUG — BUG-GW-001]

What this test does:
Calls GET /oauth-token/api/v1/token and inspects the CORS response headers.

Expected CORS headers:

  • access-control-allow-origin: https://rms.dev.demo-fsit.com (explicit trusted origin)
  • access-control-allow-headers: Content-Type, Authorization (explicit list)

Actual CORS headers:

  • access-control-allow-origin: * (wildcard — any origin)
  • access-control-allow-headers: * (wildcard — any header)
  • access-control-allow-methods: GET,POST,PUT,DELETE,PATCH,OPTIONS

Why this is dangerous:
Wildcard CORS means any website on the internet can make cross-origin requests to the oauth-token service from a user's browser. Combined with BUG-OT-002 (no auth enforcement), a malicious page can silently obtain the KCB API token on behalf of any user who visits it, even if that user has no RMS account.

Fix: Replace the APISIX global CORS plugin wildcard with an explicit allow-list containing only the RMS frontend origin.
